channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM with fway closure please cut back overgrown brambles/hedges back to boundary approx 12m x 1.5m x 1.5m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned sign, 27th May
item.description:
This sign has been left following the resurfacing of Swindon Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Bin cover removed and thrown over railway line gated access, 26th May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollis Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light flickering, 26th May
item.description:
Road opposite Chad Road, towards Griffiths Avenue Nature Reserve

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Griffiths Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge and hanging branch obstructing the footpath, 26th May
item.description:
On Lobleys Drive, the hedge between Otter Road and the Bay Tree Road mini Roundabout is blocked and unusable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road opposite no 118 and 122, 26th May
item.description:
Narrow pothole in the road, deep enough to snag a bike/motorbike tyre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unknown car blocking drive access, 26th May
item.description:
Car blocking in car at drive of 15, Station close and access to garages of 1 and 2 Ststion close. Since this afternoon. Grey suv DT 25 CNC

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Station Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo bin overflowing, not emptied recently, 26th May
item.description:
On Old Pats field by Everest Road entrance, public health hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southfield Approach, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rattling drainage cover, 26th May
item.description:
Opposite "Lorien" driveway. This drainage cover has been fixed numerous times. The constant "clacking" of vehicles driving over it at certain times of the day is an annoyance & can be heard from inside the house & out in the back garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Lane, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slab sticking a few inches above the pavement, 26th May
item.description:
Between school and Arle Avenue turning, before river Chelt

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Gloucester Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large hole between BT? 5G cabinets, 26th May
item.description:
There is a large, deep hole between cabinets installed for 5G telecomms mast. Nothing to prevent members of the public walking through the gap, particularly after dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 801 timetable dated 8th May, 26th May
item.description:
801 Timetable is showing buses every 2 hours but on Pulhams webpage Timetable shows every hour. which one is correct?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Road, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadside diversion, 26th May
item.description:
Despite repeated requests, the road signs are still left behind following recent roadworks. Please could we arrange collection?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castle Street, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: There is plenty of parking on in the Bryerland rd cul-de-sac but people are parking in the turning area which is causing problems getting onto my driveway and vehicles turning round. It needs a keep clear sign on the floor, 26th May
item.description:
It’s out side 47 Bryerland rd witcombe

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges on hyde lane, 26th May
item.description:
Why do all the verges get cut several times per year in the area but hyde lane only gets cut in the autumn ? this is experience over the last 40 years. it is really the cheltenham northern bypass and is a very busy road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 26th May
item.description:
Overgrown Grass (Needs cutting back) poor visibility. 25 mtrs x 25 mtrs circumference (Aprox) TM: Traffic lights On Roundabout (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th May
item.description:
CW: Pothole (Around Gully) 200mmx400mm42mm TM: Give and Take Stats required Opposite Cowl Lane (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles problem, 26th May
item.description:
temp lights standing in for perm lights. off/not working EY40024464061-01
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th May
item.description:
Cway pothole 600mmx350mmx44mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th May
item.description:
15 DB CW: Pothole (Patch Required). 3300mmx1000mmx46mm TM: temporary road closure Next to BT Post No 262 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
